name: THE IDOLM@STER CINDERELLA GIRLS U149
original_name: アイドルマスター シンデレラガールズ U149
overview: These small girls are ready to make it big! All 12 or younger and under 149 centimeters tall (4'11"), these aspiring pop idols dream of performing for thousands of people. But with zero experience, they've got a lot of work to do! With the help of their rookie producer, who's almost just as short, can they stay focused and make it to the top?
